title: K-200 Payload Qualification Test Report
text:
# K-200 Payload Qualification Test Report

Document number: MD-DOC-410-B. Revision: B. Type: test-report. Author: Aisha Mbeki. Created: 2023-05-11. Last modified: 2024-01-20. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Payload subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1082, P-1018, P-1077, P-1012.
